# Panopticon AI

> Compliance-grade corpus ingestion pipeline for Postgres 17 + pgvector

## Product

Panopticon ships a TypeScript library, CLI, MCP server, and hosted web UI for compliance-grade
corpus ingestion. Upload compliance documents, AI-parse into structured corpus Markdown with S.I.R.E.
identity metadata, generate cross-framework crosswalks, and download attributed vector-ready bundles.

## Docs

- [Quickstart](https://panopticonlabs.ai/quickstart): Get from zero to first embedded chunk in ~10 minutes
- [Pipeline Guide](https://panopticonlabs.ai/guide): Complete reference for sovereignty, watermarking, chunking, retrieval
- [API Reference](https://panopticonlabs.ai/api): TypeScript types, functions, and SQL RPC exports
- [MCP Server](https://panopticonlabs.ai/mcp): Connect corpus retrieval and watermark verification to Claude Desktop and Claude Code
- [Prompt Engineering (CFPO)](https://panopticonlabs.ai/prompt-engineering): Structure LLM system prompts for compliance-grade RAG
- [S.I.R.E. Identity-First Retrieval](https://panopticonlabs.ai/sire): Deterministic post-retrieval enforcement for compliance RAG
- [AI Compliance Standards](https://panopticonlabs.ai/compliance): NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act, DoD Responsible AI mappings
- [Product Roadmap](https://panopticonlabs.ai/roadmap): Contributor roadmap with phased delivery and good-first tasks
- [Privacy Policy](https://panopticonlabs.ai/privacy): How Panopticon AI documentation and software handle privacy and telemetry
- [Terms of Service](https://panopticonlabs.ai/terms): Legal terms for the Panopticon AI docs site and open-source software

## Web UI

The hosted web application provides a complete document-to-corpus workflow:

- **Sessions**: Group related compliance documents into batches for processing
- **AI Document Parsing**: CFPO-prompted AI (via OpenRouter) converts raw compliance text into structured corpus Markdown with S.I.R.E. identity metadata, frontmatter, and fact-check attestations
- **Cross-Framework Crosswalks**: AI generates control mappings across all frameworks in a session (GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2, ISO 27001, etc.)
- **Human-in-the-Loop**: Review and edit every AI-generated parse and crosswalk before finalization
- **Download Bundle**: ZIP export with all parsed documents, crosswalk, and auto-generated README

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://panopticonlabs.ai/llms-full.txt): Full documentation text for LLM context windows
